children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, and insurance are present in patient_data; if missing, return error. Generate a unique patient_id (e.g., UUID). Store patient record in patients database with registered_at timestamp. Return success with patient_id.

global_vars.description: Write new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database. Check that appointment_time is not in the past. Query appointments database for doctor_id at requested time to ensure no conflict. If available, create appointment record with status 'confirmed' and generate appointment_id. Return success with appointment details.

global_vars.description: Check availability and create appointment record

data_operations.description: Query availability and insert new appointment

constraints.description: appointment_time must be in the future
No existing appointment for same doctor at same time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record created with status 'confirmed' and unique appointment_id

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id. Sort by timestamp descending. Return list of records.

global_vars.description: Read medical records for given patient_id

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database (implicitly checked by parent)

acceptance_criteria.description: All matching records returned sorted by timestamp descending

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
children.behavior: Check patient_id exists. Update allowed fields (name, dob, contact) in patients database. If insurance field is present and changed, validate against external system (simulated check). If validation fails, return error. Otherwise, update insurance. Return success with updated profile.

global_vars.description: Read current profile and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read patient record, validate insurance, update fields

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
Insurance change must pass external validation

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile updated with validated fields

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). Note: records write operation is not covered by any child; this is acceptable because the parent's records write requirement is not triggered by any of the defined commands. If future commands require writing to records, a new child must be added.
